title: hieracium jordanii subsp. lacistum
intro: Hieracium jordanii subsp. lacistum is a rare and lesser-known plant species, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and native to the Balkan Peninsula. This plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, with its leaves, stems, and roots being used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Hieracium jordanii subsp. lacistum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea, or made into infusions and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
